title: Feature Request: View as Other User
excerpt: As an admin setting up workspace/board/column view/edit permissions, it would be useful to be able to ‘view as other user’, in order to check everything is set up correctly before release. At the moment I have to ask som…

posts.author: Megan (Megan Tooze)
posts.cookedHtml:
As an admin setting up workspace/board/column view/edit permissions, it would be useful to be able to ‘view as other user’, in order to check everything is set up correctly before release. At the moment I have to ask someone else to check if they can see what I intend them to see.

Before SSO was applied I was able to set up a dummy account for testing (which was still not ideal), but now I can’t because permissions only allow an invitation to be sent to email addresses from my organisation.

posts.author: John.Corbly7 (John Corbly)
posts.cookedHtml: I most certainly second this as an Admin setting up new sections of the Monday.com for our company. It would make testing things far easier.

posts.author: Bill_In_Ohio (Bill Duncan)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely! Many other systems have this ability, and fi monday is moving to a “WorkOS” model, then the ability for an admin to be able to see what the user can see would almost be a must have feature. I want to know what they will see before I let them see it. It just makes common sense.
